task_description: Build the complete Quant Ecosystem - a 9-app integrated platform including QuantChat (messaging), QuantMail (email/auth hub), QuantSync (social), QuantAds (advertising), QuantTube (streaming), QuantNeon (photos/AR), QuantEdits (editor), QuantMax (short video/dating), and QuantAI (AI hub). All apps share authentication via QuantMail, have deep AI integration, and are interconnected.

verification.summary: All 457 TypeScript files created across 9 apps and 6 shared packages (62,621 lines of code). All apps have complete backend APIs with routes, controllers, services, middleware, and complete frontend with pages, components, and API clients. Structure verification passes. Build/docker skipped due to INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network (no npm install for type checking).
